sections.description: AI-powered CSS/JS asset scanner for WordPress.
sections.changelog: Version 1.7.71b (beta): Start Scan now refuses an empty URL selection with a clear message instead of failing at the credit-reservation step with the opaque 'Error: Invalid page count'. Previously a restored carry-over view with nothing checked (or a URL typed into Include URLs that was already in the list) could reach Step 2 with zero pages selected. Server-side validation is unchanged and remains as defense-in-depth.
